auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Placekey API key used with the apikey request header. Generate it from the Placekey Developer Portal dashboard: https://docs.placekey.io/documentation/api-overview/authentication.

actions.name: get_geocode_from_address
actions.description: Resolve a postal address with Placekey and return the matched geocode response for the location.

street_address.description: The street address of the location to resolve into a Placekey.

region.description: The region or state of the location.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the location.

iso_country_code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the queried location.

location_name.description: The point-of-interest name used to improve Placekey matching.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for converting an address with Placekey.

query_id.description: The query identifier echoed back by Placekey.

placekey.description: The Placekey identifier returned for the matched address.

lat.description: The latitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

lng.description: The longitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

location.description: The geocoded latitude and longitude for the matched location.

location_type.description: The Placekey geocode precision level for the matched location.

geocode.description: Geocode data returned by the Placekey geocoder.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for converting an address into geocode data.

actions.name: get_placekey
actions.description: Look up a single location with Placekey and return its Placekey identifier plus optional enrichment fields.

query_id.description: A custom identifier echoed back in the Placekey response.

street_address.description: The street address of the location to resolve.

city.description: The city of the queried location.

region.description: The second-level administrative region, such as a US state code.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the queried location.

iso_country_code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the queried location.

latitude.description: The WGS-84 latitude of the queried location.

longitude.description: The WGS-84 longitude of the queried location.

location_name.description: The point-of-interest name used to improve Placekey matching.

website.description: The business website URL used to improve point-of-interest matching.

mcc_code.description: The merchant category code associated with the point of interest.

store_id.description: A brand-specific store identifier used to improve matching accuracy.

naics_code.description: The 4-digit or 6-digit NAICS code associated with the business.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the point of interest used to improve matching.

place_metadata.description: Additional metadata used by Placekey to improve point-of-interest matching.

items.description: An optional response field exposed by the Placekey API.

fields.description: Optional Placekey response fields to include in the lookup result.

strict_name_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact point-of-interest name match.

strict_address_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact address match.

options.description: Options that customize the Placekey lookup response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a single Placekey lookup.

query_id.description: The query identifier echoed back by Placekey.

placekey.description: The Placekey identifier returned for the matched location.

error.description: The lookup error returned by Placekey.

address_placekey.description: The Placekey for the address without the point-of-interest component.

building_placekey.description: The building-level Placekey returned by Placekey.

confidence_score.description: The confidence score returned by Placekey for the match.

normalized_address.description: The normalized address returned by Placekey for a successful lookup.

lat.description: The latitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

lng.description: The longitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

location.description: The geocoded latitude and longitude for the matched location.

location_type.description: The Placekey geocode precision level for the matched location.

geocode.description: Geocode data returned by the Placekey geocoder.

upi.description: The universal parcel identifier returned by Placekey.

parcel.description: The parcel identifier returned by Placekey when available.

geoid.description: The census geography identifier returned by Placekey when available.

gers.description: The Overture Maps identifier returned by Placekey when available.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a successful or failed Placekey lookup.

actions.name: get_placekey_from_address
actions.description: Resolve a postal address into a Placekey identifier using the Placekey single-lookup API.

street_address.description: The street address of the location to resolve into a Placekey.

region.description: The region or state of the location.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the location.

iso_country_code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the queried location.

location_name.description: The point-of-interest name used to improve Placekey matching.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for converting an address with Placekey.

query_id.description: The query identifier echoed back by Placekey.

placekey.description: The Placekey identifier returned for the matched address.

error.description: The lookup error returned by Placekey.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for converting an address into a Placekey.

actions.name: get_placekeys_bulk
actions.description: Look up up to 100 locations in one Placekey bulk request and return the result for each query item.

query_id.description: A custom identifier echoed back in the Placekey response.

street_address.description: The street address of the location to resolve.

city.description: The city of the queried location.

region.description: The second-level administrative region, such as a US state code.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the queried location.

iso_country_code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the queried location.

latitude.description: The WGS-84 latitude of the queried location.

longitude.description: The WGS-84 longitude of the queried location.

location_name.description: The point-of-interest name used to improve Placekey matching.

website.description: The business website URL used to improve point-of-interest matching.

mcc_code.description: The merchant category code associated with the point of interest.

store_id.description: A brand-specific store identifier used to improve matching accuracy.

naics_code.description: The 4-digit or 6-digit NAICS code associated with the business.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the point of interest used to improve matching.

place_metadata.description: Additional metadata used by Placekey to improve point-of-interest matching.

items.description: An optional response field exposed by the Placekey API.

fields.description: Optional Placekey response fields to include in the lookup result.

strict_name_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact point-of-interest name match.

strict_address_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact address match.

options.description: Options that customize the Placekey lookup response.

items.description: The input payload for a single Placekey lookup.

queries.description: The list of location queries to resolve with Placekey.

items.description: An optional response field exposed by the Placekey API.

fields.description: Optional Placekey response fields to include in the lookup result.

strict_name_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact point-of-interest name match.

strict_address_match.description: Whether Placekey should require an exact address match.

options.description: Options that customize the Placekey lookup response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Placekey bulk lookup.

query_id.description: The query identifier echoed back by Placekey.

placekey.description: The Placekey identifier returned for the matched location.

error.description: The lookup error returned by Placekey.

address_placekey.description: The Placekey for the address without the point-of-interest component.

building_placekey.description: The building-level Placekey returned by Placekey.

confidence_score.description: The confidence score returned by Placekey for the match.

normalized_address.description: The normalized address returned by Placekey for a successful lookup.

lat.description: The latitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

lng.description: The longitude returned by Placekey geocoding.

location.description: The geocoded latitude and longitude for the matched location.

location_type.description: The Placekey geocode precision level for the matched location.

geocode.description: Geocode data returned by the Placekey geocoder.

upi.description: The universal parcel identifier returned by Placekey.

parcel.description: The parcel identifier returned by Placekey when available.

geoid.description: The census geography identifier returned by Placekey when available.

gers.description: The Overture Maps identifier returned by Placekey when available.

items.description: The response payload for a successful or failed Placekey lookup.

outputSchema.description: The list of results returned by the Placekey bulk API.
